seo.title: Day Spa Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your day spa. Route unhappy clients to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Day Spas
hero.subheading: Guests leave relaxed, not thinking about Google. ReviewFlo helps you follow up after the visit.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Day Spa Faces

items.heading: A great visit doesn’t always become a review
items.body: They’re already planning the rest of their day.

items.heading: Service issues can show up publicly first
items.body: When expectations miss, frustration can land online before you hear about it.

items.heading: Therapists don’t want to ask mid-treatment
items.body: The room should feel calm, not like a sales pitch.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Day Spas

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after checkout
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when they pay and leave.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star guests go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Fits checkout at the desk
items.body: Send the link right after the appointment.

items.heading: Private feedback first
items.body: You can address concerns before they become public reviews.

items.heading: One link for your whole team

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small businesses.

items.a: Same follow-up flow. You control what you ask and when.
